commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=517dd39ab70fd15d23f01c7cc6ecbbbd33cb617f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes embedded session-lock fencing, provider retry forwarding, OpenAI SDK retry defaults, failover classification, and reply fallback handling so embedded session takeover errors produce resend guidance instead of silent message loss.

PR surface: Source +154, Tests +1145. Total +1299 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection plus the PR's real-setup proof show a high-confidence path: OpenAI SDK retries keep the prompt lock released while a concurrent session write changes the transcript, causing an organic EmbeddedAttemptSessionTakeoverError. I did not rerun the tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can add the missing lifecycle terminal emission and regression test without choosing a new product direction.
